column1: Mother saw that Nick (not to wash) his hands.
The teacher (to understand) that Lena hadn't done her homework.
I knew that my friend (not to come) yet.
When I (to wake) up yesterday, father had already gone to work.
Nick thought that his father (not to come) home yet.
Mary (to tell) us that she had cooked a good dinner.
Yesterday I found the book which I (to lose) in summer.
When we (to come) to the station, the train had already left.
By two o’clock the teacher (to examine) all the students.
On my way to school I (to remember) that I had left my report at home.
My friends were glad to hear that I (to pass) all the exams successfully.
Poor Oliver (to lie) unconscious on the spot where Sikes had left him.
